testcase.name: test_twinfinder_celebrities

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'categories': ['actor', 'actress'], 'celebrities': [{'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Chris Hemsworth'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Scarlett Johansson'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Brad Pitt'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Angelina Jolie'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Leonardo DiCaprio'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Jennifer Lawrence'}, ...], 'total': 20}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_exhaustive_qa.py:280: in test_twinfinder_celebrities assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'categories': ['actor', 'actress'], 'celebrities': [{'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Chris Hemsworth'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Scarlett Johansson'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Brad Pitt'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Angelina Jolie'}, {'category': 'actor', 'name': 'Leonardo DiCaprio'}, {'category': 'actress', 'name': 'Jennifer Lawrence'}, ...], 'total': 20}, list)

testcase.name: test_admin_analytics_dashboard

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('totalUsers' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True} or 'users' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True} or 'total_users' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_exhaustive_qa.py:354: in test_admin_analytics_dashboard assert "totalUsers" in data or "users" in data or "total_users" in data E AssertionError: assert ('totalUsers' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True} or 'users' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True} or 'total_users' in {'data': {'credits': {'used': 1751}, 'exceptions': {'critical': 0, 'total': 5, 'unresolved': 5}, 'generations': {'creditsUsed': 1751, 'genstudioRecent': 0, 'genstudioTotal': 0, 'recent': 159, ...}, 'overview': {'activeSessions': 3, 'activeUsers': 3, 'newUsers': 7, 'periodRevenue': 795.0, ...}, ...}, 'success': True})
